2605.29218.title: GTA: Generating Long-Horizon Tasks for Web Agents at Scale
2605.29218.paper_summary: Web agents, which couple language models with browsing and tool-use capabilities, show promise as open web assistants. Yet progress is increasingly limited by the lack of scalable, process-level supervision. Existing benchmarks are largely manually constructed, providing only coarse start-goal annotations without intermediate trajectories, while recent automatic generation efforts remain expensive, biased, and shallow. These limitations prevent reliable training and evaluation of agents that must generalize to realistic, multi-hop, cross-page tasks. We introduce a scalable framework, GTA, that integrates crawling, retrieval-based seeding, in-context generation, and automated quality control to produce realistic tasks paired with executable trajectories. This design decouples crawling from generation for greater efficiency, grounds tasks in the site graph to enforce compositionality, and ensures dense supervision through deterministic replays and systematic validation. We instantiate the pipeline on over 50 websites covering e-commerce, government, forums, and news, with multilingual and multi-hop coverage. The resulting benchmark reveals a significant human-agent performance gap and enables detailed diagnostics. Our contributions are three-fold: (i) formalizing multi-hop web-agent task generation, (ii) proposing an efficient and validated pipeline for automatic data creation, and (iii) releasing a dynamic benchmark with reproducible evaluation.
2605.29218.paper_summary_zh: 網路代理，將語言模型與瀏覽和工具使用能力結合，顯示出作為開放網路助手的潛力。<lb/>然而，進展越來越受到可擴展的過程級監督缺乏的限制。<lb/>現有的基準大多是手動構建的，只提供粗略的起始-目標註釋，而沒有中間軌跡，近期的自動生成努力仍然昂貴、有偏見且淺薄。<lb/>這些限制阻礙了代理的可靠訓練和評估，這些代理必須能夠泛化到現實的多跳跨頁任務。<lb/>我們介紹了一個可擴展的框架，GTA，該框架整合了爬取、基於檢索的種子生成、上下文生成和自動質量控制，以生成配有可執行軌跡的現實任務。<lb/>這一設計將爬取與生成解耦，以提高效率，將任務基於網站圖進行基礎設置以強制組合性，並通過確定性重播和系統驗證確保密集監督。<lb/>我們在涵蓋電子商務、政府、論壇和新聞的50多個網站上實現了這一管道，並提供多語言和多跳的覆蓋。<lb/>最終的基準揭示了人類與代理之間的顯著性能差距，並使詳細診斷成為可能。我們的貢獻有三方面：(i) 正式化多跳網路代理任務生成，(ii) 提出一個高效且經過驗證的自動數據創建管道，以及 (iii) 發布一個具有可重複評估的動態基準。
2605.29218.author: Tenghao Huang et.al.
2605.29218.authors: Tenghao Huang, Kung-Hsiang Huang, Prafulla Kumar Choubey, Yilun Zhou, Muhao Chen, Jonathan May, Chien-Sheng Wu
